description_long: This is a modern, two-story house set within a fenced lot featuring a spacious driveway, landscaped gardens, and several trees. The house has a flat roof with a mix of large windows and glass doors, providing ample natural light to the interior. The front yard includes a green lawn bordered by flower beds and a paved path leading to a covered porch supported by columns. The driveway accommodates multiple cars and is flanked by mature trees and decorative shrubs. The property is enclosed by a white picket fence, with palm trees and flowering bushes adding to the suburban aesthetic. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open spaces, and a blend of natural and built elements.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, large windows, landscaped gardens, and a spacious driveway within a fenced lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, covered porch, green lawn, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and flower beds.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the driveway, multiple parked cars, extensive garden, and the house's glass-walled sections.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the house, additional garden space, and the continuation of the white fence and palm trees.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the driveway, more trees, and the house's modern architectural features with large windows and flat roof.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a covered porch with columns, steps, and a prominent front door.
